decision_taken: CONFIRMED label-only log shell: Maintenance.php is an empty FarmLogType subclass (no base/bundle field definitions, no quantity types); log.type.maintenance.yml uses the shared farm_log_workflow (done/pending/abandoned) that activity/harvest/observation also use.
